title: Leadership Team
subtitle: Experienced executives driving innovation and client success
intro: Our leadership team brings decades of combined experience in technology consulting, cybersecurity, operations, and human capital management. Together they guide Heritage InfoTech's mission to deliver measurable results for every client engagement.

members.name: Shilpa Bhavsar
members.title: Founder & Chief Executive Officer
members.bio: Shilpa founded Heritage InfoTech in 2013 with a conviction that technology consulting must begin with people. Under her leadership, the firm has grown from a regional staffing boutique into a national consulting organization serving healthcare, financial services, logistics, and government sectors. She sets the strategic vision for client partnerships, culture, and long-term growth.

members.name: Hemang Bhavsar
members.title: Chief Technology Officer
members.bio: Hemang oversees all technology strategy, solution architecture, and the firm's Cybersecurity and Quantum Readiness practices. With deep expertise in enterprise integration, cloud platforms, and post-quantum cryptography, he ensures every Heritage engagement is built on secure, scalable, and future-ready foundations.

members.name: Robert Mitchell
members.title: Chief Operating Officer
members.bio: Robert brings 22 years of operational excellence from global consulting and managed services environments. He leads service delivery, MSP/VMS program management, and client success operations — ensuring Heritage InfoTech consistently meets SLA commitments across all 50 states.

members.name: Sarah Chen
members.title: Chief Financial Officer
members.bio: Sarah directs financial strategy, compliance, and enterprise risk management. A CPA with prior leadership roles in financial services and insurance, she ensures fiscal discipline and transparent governance that supports sustainable growth and client trust.

members.name: James Whitfield
members.title: Senior Director, Human Resources
members.bio: James leads talent acquisition strategy, employee engagement, and workforce compliance programs. He architected Heritage's National Recruiting & Delivery model and maintains the firm's commitment to diversity, inclusion, and professional development at every level.

members.name: Maria Okonkwo
members.title: Vice President, Cybersecurity
members.bio: Maria heads the Cybersecurity division including Quantum Readiness as a Service. A CISSP and former security architect for Fortune 100 financial institutions, she leads cryptographic discovery, risk scoring, hybrid PQC implementations, and zero-trust security programs for regulated enterprise clients.
